title: Lastrea albopunctata
taxonomy: Lastrea albopunctata is classified in the family Dryopteridaceae, a large family of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or shield ferns. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a genus of ferns distributed in tropical and subtropical regions of the Old World. The species is further classified into the subfamily Dryopteridoideae, which includes ferns with undivided or lobed fronds. The classification is based on the morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic studies of the plant. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity of the species within the family.
